claims: The skill imposes an arbitrary requirement that filenames must be ASCII-only, forcing users to rename files containing non-ASCII characters (e.g., Chinese, Cyrillic). This restriction is unrelated to the skill's stated purpose of routing files based on extension/MIME type, as filename character encoding does not affect file-type detection or routing logic. It unnecessarily limits user workflows and excludes legitimate multilingual filenames without technical justification.
